title: How Otter.ai Handles In-Person Meetings (And What's Missing)

pages.title: How Otter.ai Handles In-Person Meetings (And What's Missing)

cards.title: [Otter.
cards.body: [Otter.ai](https://otter.ai) is a popular app for transcribing meetings. It works well for virtual video conferencing meetings and also supports in-person meetings.

cards.title: For virtual meetings, Otter send…
cards.body: For virtual meetings, Otter sends a bot to join the user's meeting to record and transcribe. For in-person meetings, Otter relies on a mobile app to record the conversation.

cards.title: If you're building a transcripti…
cards.body: If you're building a transcription or meeting intelligence product, you might consider enabling in-person capture similar to Otter, especially as hybrid work becomes the norm.

pages.title: How Otter.ai Handles In-Person Meetings (And What's Missing)

cards.title: However, relying on phones or la…
cards.body: However, relying on phones or laptops to capture offline meetings introduces limitations in audio quality, reliability, and scalability.

pages.title: How Otter.ai Handles In-Person Meetings (And What's Missing)
pages.section: Does Otter Provide Dedicated Hardware for In-Person Meetings?

cards.title: No.
cards.body: No. Otter does not offer dedicated meeting room hardware.

cards.title: For virtual meetings, bots work …
cards.body: For virtual meetings, bots work well because audio streams are already digitized. But physical meeting rooms require microphones, edge processing, connectivity, and secure syncing infrastructure.

cards.title: Without purpose-built hardware, …
cards.body: Without purpose-built hardware, in-person recording depends on:

pages.section: Does Otter Provide Dedicated Hardware for In-Person Meetings?

cards.title: A user remembering to open an ap…
cards.body: A user remembering to open an app A phone placed in the middle of the table Consumer-grade microphones Manual workflows

cards.title: For teams building transcription…
cards.body: For teams building transcription products, this creates a gap between virtual and physical meeting capture.

cards.body: Deploy physical recording devices in meeting rooms Automatically capture in-person conversations Securely sync recordings to the cloud Access audio via API Trigger transcription pipelines automatically

cards.title: This allows software companies t…
cards.body: This allows software companies to add offline meeting support without becoming a hardware company.

pages.title: How Otter.ai Handles In-Person Meetings (And What's Missing)

cards.title: In summary, Otter.
cards.body: In summary, Otter.ai does not provide dedicated hardware for in-person meetings.

cards.title: However, there are other options…
cards.body: However, there are other options such as relying on mobile devices to record conversations, building your own hardware infrastructure, or integrating with a hardware + API platform like Bota instead.
